# Build + test dependencies for the ARM64 release builder images.
#
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH: edit this file to add/remove a build dependency.
# Editing it triggers .github/workflows/builder-images.yml, which rebuilds and
# republishes the GHCR builder images consumed by release.yml's build-arm64 job.
#
# One package per line. Blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored.
build-essential
pkg-config
libao-dev
libcurl4-openssl-dev
libgcrypt20-dev
libjson-c-dev
libavcodec-dev
libavformat-dev
libavfilter-dev
libavutil-dev
libswresample-dev
libwebsockets-dev
libasound2-dev
libblas-dev
liblapack-dev
check
python3-yaml
nodejs
npm
